tasks.title: Stand up WebGPU compositor
tasks.detail: Multi-layer alpha blend with per-clip opacity, transform, and fades. Canvas2D fallback.

tasks.title: Trim handles on timeline clips
tasks.detail: Drag edges to adjust in-point and duration, clamped to source length. Snapping to neighbors and playhead.

tasks.title: Clip CRUD + persistence API
tasks.detail: REST endpoints for add / move / trim / delete, JSON-backed, broadcast over WebSocket.

tasks.title: Image asset upload
tasks.detail: Upload images into the media bin and sample them as WebGPU textures.

tasks.title: Audio track + waveform
tasks.detail: Add an audio track type and draw waveforms. Scoped for the next milestone.

tasks.title: Define v1 milestone scope
tasks.detail: Head sets the build plan and hands work to the agent pool.
